description: quotes.rest is the API endpoint for They Said So's quotes service. It provides quote-of-the-day, random quote search and retrieval, quote images, private quote storage, and quote collection features.
summary: quotes.rest exposes one REST API, the They Said So Quotes API, documented with an OpenAPI spec and authenticated with a They Said So API key sent as Bearer auth, `X-TheySaidSo-Api-Secret`, or `api_key` query parameter.
